Variables.Name: CameraOffset
Variables.Description: The camera-relative offset to apply to sprite location

Variables.Name: bSpawnTimeOnly
Variables.Description: If true, the offset will only be processed at spawn time

Variables.Name: UpdateMethod
Variables.Description:
How to update the offset for this module.
	  DirectSet - Set the value directly (overwrite any previous setting)
	  Additive  - Add the offset of this module to the existing offset
	  Scalar    - Scale the existing offset by the value of this module
